title: Mukhyamantri
desc: Bimal is forced to contest the local elections, but his opponent plots against him.

title: Nayak: The Real Hero
desc: A common man's life changes when he becomes the chief minister of Maharashtra for a day.

title: Dui Prithibi
desc: A rich man falls in love with an idealistic medical student who teaches him compassion.

title: Wanted
desc: The police kill Shibu as they mistake him for his lookalike Raja, an assassin.

title: Bibaho Obhijaan
desc: Two friends face funny situations in their marriage as they are upset with their wives.

title: Zulfiqar
desc: When a crime syndicate's trusted figure is eliminated, chaos takes over.

title: Shiv Shakti
desc: Mainadevi approaches Narayan and requests him to marry Parvati, and he accepts her proposal. S01 E114.

title: Fight 1:1
desc: Two rival students and their groups compete in all aspects of their college life.

title: Abbajan
desc: A mother's prejudice is challenged when her children form a close bond with a Muslim man.

title: Mastan
desc: Raju, an orphan, is raised by a smuggler and grows up to become his right-hand man.

title: Khoka 420
desc: Things become complicated when Megha's best friend, Bhoomi, falls in love with Krish.

title: Surya
desc: A businessman is killed for his property by a man whom he helped, unaware of his reality.

title: Sneher Protidan
desc: Mohan and his brothers fall prey to a misunderstanding, which risks their bond.

title: Villain
desc: A woman's fiance turns out to be a lookalike of her friend's boyfriend.

desc: Binoy Sardar returns to his homeland Jagatpur and finds everything changed. After hearing about the plans of uprooting his village.

title: Shiv Shakti
desc: Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati fulfil their duties together while sacrificing and caring for humanity.

title: Jamai No 1
desc: the story of a businessman whose two sons-in-law depend on him. What happens when his third daughter marries a thief?

title: Chandra Mallika
desc: A dramatic tale of love and betrayal where courage, sacrifice, and passion collide, shaping destinies and testing resilience against fate's cruel turns.
